# Q 

2 

M 

SILKDRYER EVO

## Exterior / Accessories

### Improved and more absorbent than ever! Twist-loop, synthetic fibres for impressive drying and a streak-free finish.

Q²M SilkDryer EVO is an updated and improved version of one of the most innovative drying towels. Compared with the version introduced in 2015, the EVO variant features a higher GSM of 530. The total absorbency is up to 50% higher than before. Reduced edges to an absolute minimum make the towel even more functional and safer on complex-shaped panels.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2016/10/productmain_1700x1645px_q2m_silkdryer-1024x991.jpg)

[Technical Details](#technical-details)

## TECHNICAL DETAILS

SIZES 

50x55 cm / 70x90 cm

## HOW TO USE

Q 

2 

M 

SILKDRYER EVO

01
Lay the towel flat on a wet surface. 

02
Gently pull or pat to absorb water. 

03
Avoid applying pressure during drying. 

04
Wring out if saturated and continue. 

05
Wash after use to maintain performance. 

## FREQUENTLY ASKED
QUESTIONS

01
What is SILKDRYER EVO used for? 

Drying painted surfaces after washing.

02
Is it safe on ceramic coatings? 

Yes, it is suitable for coated vehicles.

03
Does it require pressure to work? 

No, it absorbs water with minimal contact.

04
Can it be used on glass and trim? 

Yes, it can be used on exterior surfaces.

05
How should it be maintained? 

Wash with a dedicated microfibre detergent.

[FIND MORE ANSWERS](https://gyeon.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/sections/360000263117-Q-M-SilkDryer)

## Recommended Pairing

We recommend complementary products that perfectly match your current one, creating a complete and convenient KIT. Together, they deliver the best performance and a seamless user experience.
